name: Caro
descriptionTemplate:
When the {Embryo Fusion} reaches its limit, you will gain 1 {Embryo}. Unleashing Exalt consumes {Embryo} to trigger a powerful {Devour} Effect. Therefore, try to Unleash Exalt when you have {Embryo} in hand; otherwise, you won't be able to bring out the full potential of the {Caro} team.
After each battle, 5% of Max HP Recovery is accumulated into the {Crimson Furnace}. If there are unused {Embryo}, each {Embryo} also contributes 5% of Max HP Recovery to the Furnace. The {Crimson Furnace} can be used to restore the party's HP, and can be converted into healing once per turn. The Keeper must carefully plan when to use the {Crimson Furnace} to turn the tide of battle.
